SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.equipment.powergeneration.gasturbine

Class CO2TaxSchedule

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.powergeneration.gasturbine.CO2TaxSchedule
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class CO2TaxSchedule extends Object implements Serializable
Year-by-year schedule of effective CO2 cost on offshore fuel gas combustion (combined national CO2 tax + emission trading scheme allowance).

Values are loaded from resources/data/powergeneration/co2_tax_norway.csv and exposed as NOK per tonne CO2. Linear interpolation is used between supplied years and the schedule is held constant before / after the supported range.

Version:
$Id: $Id
Author:
neqsim

      public double getTotalNOKPerTonne(int year)

      Parameters:
      year - calendar year
      Returns:
      total CO2 cost [NOK/tonne], or 0 if the schedule is empty
